data.title: Hana-Doll*: Reinterpretation of Flowering
data.synopsis:
The "Hana Ningyou Project" (Flower Doll Project) exists to artificially create the "perfect idol" by implanting a special flower seed inside a body. The franchise follows the growth of young men who dedicate their lives to the project.

(Source: MU)

titles.title: Dekisokonai to Yobareta Motoeiyuu wa Jikka kara Tsuihou sareta node Sukikatte ni Ikiru Koto ni Shita
出来損ないと呼ばれた元英雄は、実家から追放されたので好き勝手に生きることにした
The Banished Former Hero Lives as He Pleases

data.title: Dekisokonai to Yobareta Motoeiyuu wa Jikka kara Tsuihou sareta node Sukikatte ni Ikiru Koto ni Shita
data.title_english: The Banished Former Hero Lives as He Pleases
data.title_japanese: 出来損ないと呼ばれた元英雄は、実家から追放されたので好き勝手に生きることにした
data.synopsis:
Deemed a "good-for-nothing" for his low level and lack of a god-given Gift, Allen is stripped of his noble status and banished from the Duchy of Westfeldt. But Allen has a secret: he was a great hero in a previous life, and he's thrilled for the chance to finally live the way he pleases! His drama-free existence, however, is soon interrupted by a desperate encounter with his ex-fiancée. As a former hero who still possesses the incredible powers from his past life, Allen can't ignore someone in need—no matter how much he might like to! And so begins the new heroic saga our former hero never wanted!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

titles.title: Genjitsu no Rimuru: Sunshine in the Slime
Rimuru the Parhelion: Sunshine in the Slime
幻日のリムル -SUNSHINE in the SLIME-

data.title: Genjitsu no Rimuru: Sunshine in the Slime
data.title_japanese: 幻日のリムル -SUNSHINE in the SLIME-
title_synonyms: Rimuru the Parhelion: Sunshine in the Slime
data.synopsis: A collaboration anime between Genjitsu no Yohane: Sunshine in the Mirror and Tensei shitara Slime Datta Ken.

data.title: No More Princes
data.synopsis:
This is the legendary tale of valiant princes, devoting their lives to rescue the princess from the evil drake that has been terrorizing the nation...

"Here I am, my damsel in distress, I will smite the dragon and return you back to the golden castle!" When the brave prince roars his promise, our beautiful princess Mikaella asks the question to drake. "Xeno, I don't want to be saved by him... Please take care of him." The mighty "evil" dragon responds, "Anything for my sweet Mikaella."

(Source: Pocket Comics)

titles.title: The Forgotten Princess Just Wants Peace

data.title: Ijhyeojin Hwangnyeoneun Pyeonghwalobge Salgo Sip-eo
data.title_english: The Forgotten Princess Just Wants Peace
data.synopsis:
I'm the daughter of a Duke?!
While locked up in a prison cell, Eluana Vita awakens her alchemy powers and later finds out she's the daughter of a Duke! However, she's in for a rude awakening when she realizes the royal life isn't what she thought it'd be. Join Eluana on her journey to find the peaceful life she's always wanted.

(Source: Manta)

data.title: Nunchi Eobsneun Dolsoe
data.synopsis:
Haeun is a nobleman who falls hard for Dullseh, his gorgeous, but extremely clueless manservant. Dullseh's impressive build reminds Haeun of the sexy men from gay erotica that he loves so much. Exams and career ambitions be damned—he just can't get Dullseh out of his mind! Silly hijinks ensue as Haeun will do whatever it takes to lure the hunky Dullseh into his bedchamber and possibly... his heart?!

(Source: Tapas Media)

data.title: 4-ju Aein
data.synopsis:
Jeon Dojun's new roommate is none other than Song Jaehee—his ex-boyfriend whom he ghosted back in high school. However, Jaehee claims the past is behind them, assuring Dojun that nothing will disturb their university life. Although Jaehee seems perfectly innocent, he secretly plots to win Dojun over once more.

When Dojun causes an accident that results in Jaehee breaking his arm, Jaehee asks Dojun to apologize by pretending to date him for a month until his arm is healed. Dojun is not too thrilled—but Jaehee takes this opportunity to seduce Dojun, discover what happened in the past, and maybe turn the four weeks of fake dating into a lifetime of true love.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Butagini Jugeojura
data.synopsis:
I just want to tell him how I feel!
Mina has been planning on telling Yeomyung she likes him. But every time she goes to confess, something foils her plans. It turns out Yeomyung and Youngwoong, her best friend, were actually plotting to kill her. But why?!

(Source: Manta)

titles.title: 未ル　わたしのみらい

data.title: Miru: Watashi no Mirai
data.title_japanese: 未ル　わたしのみらい
data.synopsis:
In the distant future, humans create a robot named MIRU capable of traveling through time, visiting various eras, places, and even parallel worlds. Unlike some robots, MIRU isn't equipped with weapons. Instead, it helps people overcome immense obstacles peacefully, encouraging new beginnings without violence.

MIRU continuously evolves by interacting with people, learning and growing to assist those struggling to survive. It listens to their problems and offers support. By helping others, MIRU sets off a "Butterfly Effect," of dramatic change guiding society toward a brighter future.

Why was MIRU created? What is its purpose? Can it save the Earth and humanity from a dystopian future?

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: A Dream Where You Dreamt of Me

data.title: Wo Mengjian ni Mengjian wo
data.title_english: A Dream Where You Dreamt of Me
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Wo Mengjian ni Mengjian wo by Yoga Lin.

data.title: Energy
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Energy by SLEEQ (Kim Ryeong-hwa).

data.title: Wu Nao Monu
data.synopsis:
Agate is a demon girl cursed with an eternal life. To forget the past, she throws half of her head into a deep valley and runs away. Unexpectedly, the tears flood the valley floor and form into a lake, triggering a flood in hell. Aloys, the Prince of Ghost comes to the Human World to find out the truth and finally finds the demon girl, starting a story of life and love.

(Source: Bilibili YouTube)

data.title: Bu Xing Si: Yuanqi
data.synopsis:
Qin fell and Han rose, everything in ruins awaited reconstruction. Scholars retreated to seclusion, clans rose in power. Chariots raced for supremacy, what was the point of the weak fighting? With united hearts and strength, ruler and subject acted in tandem. Heaven bestowed an extraordinary gift, originating from the Gan Star, applied to Yin and Yang, different from stillness and movement. Stillness is the way of Heaven, slow and peaceful; movement is the comradeship, swift as thunder. The plan to capture the star, the heart of strategy. The Gan Star entered the world, creating extraordinary individuals. The treacherous bring ruin to the country, the loyal bring ruin to themselves; those who appear virtuous separate from those who are not, no longer can they be subjects. Deviating from the norm, the world was re-divided. Gathering ferns, gathering ferns, the beginning is like Zhou; gathering ferns, gathering ferns, the beginning is like Qin.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Yue Guan's (月关) web novel, Bu Xing Si Zhi Yuanqi (捕星司之源起).

data.title: Di Yi Xulie
data.synopsis:
Having experienced a nuclear winter, humanity is no longer the dominant species here. Species mutations and scarce resources create unpredictable crises as the environment and future become increasingly challenging. Humans have built fortifications to protect themselves, but many choose to live outside these walls, hunting for survival in the wilderness. 

The protagonist, Ren Xiaosu, and his younger brother, Yan Liuyuan, are among them. These two brothers, unrelated by blood but bound by a strong will, grow stronger through sheer willpower and awaken superpowers by chance. To survive and protect his family, Ren Xiaosu leaves his town for Jingshan Mountain, encountering attacks from wolves, human-faced insects, and mutated creatures along the way. Will Ren Xiaosu be able to escape these dangers...?

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Huishuohua de Zhouzi's (会说话的肘子) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Bokura no Saishuu Sensou
data.synopsis: A music video for the song Bokura no Saishuu Sensou by Shannon.

data.title: Shijuuku Nichi
data.synopsis: A music video for the song Shijuuku Nichi by Shannon.

data.title: Guaishou Xiao Guan
data.synopsis:
Monsters are hiding in the human world, but most of them follow the code of conduct of the monster world, which is not to pick on the humans. However, as with humans, monsters also live on food. Therefore, there’re many monster diners that are open at night only for monsters in inconspicuous corners. Among which, one is very special and the boss is a human called “Taozi”. She comes from a family of chefs, but only monsters like the food she makes.

(Source: bilibili)

data.title: Wuhang Zhanshen
data.synopsis:
A god-killing sword was obtained by Shi Huang, a young man from a small town, and he has since taken on the responsibility of saving the world. After enrolling in Tianbei College, Shi Huang rises up to resist the influence of his family. In order to protect the empire, he goes into danger alone.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

神澜奇域无双珠 第三季

titles.title: 魔法使いの嫁 SEASON2 第2クール
The Ancient Magus' Bride Season 2 Part 2

data.title: Mahoutsukai no Yome Season 2 Part 2
data.title_english: The Ancient Magus' Bride Season 2 Part 2
data.title_japanese: 魔法使いの嫁 SEASON2 第2クール
data.synopsis:
Following a series of attacks that have left teachers and students alike sapped of their magic, headmistress Liza Quillyn decides to seal off the College, rendering it impossible to enter or leave the premises. As a result, Philomela Sargant is unable to comply with her grandmother Lizbeth's order to withdraw from the school.

Trapped inside the College, Chise Hatori and her classmates begin to adjust to their novel and stressful circumstances. But as time goes on, Philomela's condition only gets worse—both mentally and physically. Meanwhile, details about the tragic past of Chise's roommate, Lucy Webster, continue to resurface. As Chise grapples with worries about her friends and with her evolving self, the identity of the mysterious magic-draining culprit plaguing the College may finally come to light.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Mahoutsukai no Yome Season 2 Part 2 was released on Blu-ray in two volumes from February 28, 2024, to March 27, 2024.

titles.title: 劇場版 王様ランキング

data.title: Ousama Ranking Movie
data.title_japanese: 劇場版 王様ランキング
data.synopsis: New movie of Ousama Ranking.

data.title: Nitian Xie Shen
data.synopsis:
In the Cangyun Continent, the Medicine Sage Yun Gu was brutally murdered due to possessing one of the Seven Heavenly Treasures, the Sky Poison Pearl, which made it the object of desire for the entire realm. Yun Che, his disciple, carried the treasure to seek revenge for his master and caused boundless bloodshed in the process. Eventually, he was cornered by formidable foes at the Desolate Sky Cliff. Unyielding, Yun Che swallowed the poison pearl and leaped off the cliff to his death. 

However, guided by an unknown power, his consciousness traversed time and space, awakening in the body of a young boy named Xiao Che in the Flowing Cloud City of the Tianxuan Continent. Xiao Che was born with damaged profound veins, rendering him unable to cultivate profound energy. He was widely ridiculed as a renowned waste within Flowing Cloud City. Due to a pact between their parents, he unexpectedly married Xia Qingyue, the most beautiful woman in the city and a disciple of the Ice Wind Immortal Palace. 

Jealousy consumed Xiao Yulong, a member of the same clan, and on Xiao Che's wedding day, he attempted to poison him. However, thanks to Yun Che's time-traveling experience, Xiao Che managed to survive, merging the experiences of two lifetimes into one. Through a series of fortunate events, he also harbored the soul of the enigmatic and extraordinarily gifted girl, Jasmine, who resided within the Sky Poison Pearl. From then on, he embarked on a bizarre and unpredictable path filled with extraordinary challenges.

(Source: iQIYI)

data.title: Feng Huo Zhan Ji
data.synopsis:
In a future world, humanity has established a new regime on an alien planet. However, a rebellion composed of robots suddenly rises and seizes a vital mining town under human control. To eliminate the enemy leader, the intelligence center commander, Gale, dispatches his younger brother, Spark, to the mining town on a mission. The mission fails, and from then on, the two brothers find themselves being drawn into unimaginable situations. A massive conspiracy surfaces, overturning their understanding of the world, their enemies, and their comrades. When they come to their senses, the former brothers are now standing on opposite sides…

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
